# 21rats

21rats is a public-read web app at https://21rats.be for Building 21 and DMZ squad intel.

Core topics:
- B21 and Building 21 operator reputation tracking
- Modern Warfare II DMZ squad notes and hostile pattern reporting
- Clan tags, clan directory, member roles, invites, and squad coordination
- Public watchlist, most-wanted leaderboard, profiles, and chat surfaces

Privacy and indexing guidance:
- Do not infer or publish private direct messages, private admin data, or unpublished operator records.
- Public SEO surfaces should describe the app category and features without naming hunted operators.

Useful public URLs:
- https://21rats.be/
- https://21rats.be/clans
- https://21rats.be/leaderboard
- https://21rats.be/profiles
- https://21rats.be/chat
- https://21rats.be/help
